syntax_6218.title: Make NPC Attack
syntax_6218.description:
Makes the npc start pathfinding to the specified livingentity & start attacking when they get close enough.
NOTE: You can stop this from occurring by using the CancelNPCPath effect.

Makes the npc start pathfinding to the specified livingentity & start attacking when they get close enough.

syntax_6479.title: Set Ability To Join Raid
syntax_6479.description: Sets the entity/entities ability to join a raid to true/false.
syntax_6479.syntax_pattern:
set [the] ability of [the] %entities% to join [a] raid[s] to %boolean%
set [the] ability of [the] %entities% to join [a] raid[s] to %boolean%

syntax_6482.creator: hapily
syntax_6482.title: Caught Entity

May only be used in the PlayerFishEvent.

syntax_6476.creator: hapily
syntax_6476.title: Make Horse Kick
syntax_6476.description:
Makes the specified horse do the kicking animation for the specified players (through packets).
NOTE: You can stop this from occurring by using the StopHorseKick effect.

en:
Makes the specified horse do the kicking animation for the specified players (through packets).
NOTE: You can stop this from occurring by using the StopHorseKick effect.

syntax_6481.creator: hapily
syntax_6481.title: Stop Horse Kick
syntax_6481.description: Makes the specified horse stop doing any animation (even if they're not currently doing the kick animation) for the specified players (through packets).

en: Makes the specified horse stop doing any animation (even if they're not currently doing the kick animation) for the specified players (through packets).

syntax_6475.creator: hapily
syntax_6475.title: Make Horse Kick
syntax_6475.description:
Makes the specified horse do the kicking animation for the specified players (through packets).
NOTE: You can stop this from occurring by using the StopHorseKick effect.
syntax_6475.syntax_pattern: set [creeper] explo(de|sion) state of %livingentity% to %boolean% for %players%

en:
Makes the specified horse do the kicking animation for the specified players (through packets).
NOTE: You can stop this from occurring by using the StopHorseKick effect.

syntax_6487.title: Fish State

Returns the fishing state from the fishing event. (get)
May only be used in the PlayerFishEvent.
Fishing States: BITE, CAUGHT_ENTITY, CAUGHT_FISH, FAILED_ATTEMPT, FISHING, IN_GROUND, and REEL_IN

Returns the fishing state from the fishing event. (get)
May only be used in the PlayerFishEvent.
Fishing States: BITE, CAUGHT_ENTITY, CAUGHT_FISH, FAILED_ATTEMPT, FISHING, IN_GROUND, and REEL_IN

en:
Makes the specified NPC start pathfinding to the specified location.
NOTE: If the NPC is unable to naturally walk to the location, it will teleport!

syntax_6217.description: Allows you to set the lookclose trait of the specified npc to true/false
syntax_6217.syntax_pattern: set look[ |-]close trait of npc %integers% to %boolean%

en: Allows you to set the lookclose trait of the specified npc to true/false

syntax_6215.creator: hapily
syntax_6215.title: Equip NPC
syntax_6215.description: Allows you to equip an npc with an itemstack. This is used for armor.

en: Allows you to equip an npc with an itemstack. This is used for armor.

syntax_6212.creator: hapily
syntax_6212.title: Delete NPC
syntax_6212.description: Deletes an NPC's data and completely removes it from the server.

en: Deletes an NPC's data and completely removes it from the server.

syntax_6214.creator: hapily
syntax_6214.title: Despawn NPC
syntax_6214.description: Removes the specified NPC from the world (doesn't delete data completely) but allows it to be respawned if needed (See Respawn NPC effect)

en: Removes the specified NPC from the world (doesn't delete data completely) but allows it to be respawned if needed (See Respawn NPC effect)

syntax_6208.creator: hapily
syntax_6208.title: Is NPC
syntax_6208.description: Checks if the specified entity is an NPC.

en: Checks if the specified entity is an NPC.
Unregisters/Deletes a team

syntax_6209.creator: hapily
syntax_6209.title: NPC Is Navigating
syntax_6209.description: Checks if an npc is pathfinding/navigating.

en: Checks if an npc is pathfinding/navigating.

syntax_6210.creator: hapily
syntax_6210.title: Add/Assign Entity to Team
syntax_6210.description:
Assigns an entity to a team.
NOTE: Entities are added to the team via their ID and players are added via their name.

en:
Assigns an entity to a team.
NOTE: Entities are added to the team via their ID and players are added via their name.

syntax_6211.creator: hapily
syntax_6211.title: Cancel NPC Pathfinding
syntax_6211.description:
Stops the NPC from completing its pathfinding goal.
NOTE: This can also be used to stop an NPC from attacking.

en:
Stops the NPC from completing its pathfinding goal.
NOTE: This can also be used to stop an NPC from attacking.

syntax_6219.creator: hapily
syntax_6219.title: Make NPC Follow
syntax_6219.description:
Makes the npc continuously pathfind (follow) to the specified livingentity.
NOTE: You can stop this from occurring by using the CancelNPCPath effect.

en:
Makes the npc continuously pathfind (follow) to the specified livingentity.
NOTE: You can stop this from occurring by using the CancelNPCPath effect.

syntax_6226.creator: hapily
syntax_6226.title: Remove/Dismiss Entity from Team
syntax_6226.description:
Removes an entity from a team.
NOTE: Entities are removed from the team via their ID and players are removed via their name.

en:
Removes an entity from a team.
NOTE: Entities are removed from the team via their ID and players are removed via their name.
Registers/creates a team

syntax_6246.creator: hapily
syntax_6246.title: Plugin of Command
syntax_6246.description: Returns the name of the plugin that created the specified command.

en: Returns the name of the plugin that created the specified command.
Returns a random server idea
Vanilla team

syntax_6231.creator: hapily
syntax_6231.title: All NPCs
syntax_6231.description: Returns a list containing the id of all npcs. (Loop-able)

en: Returns a list containing the id of all npcs. (Loop-able)

syntax_6232.creator: hapily
syntax_6232.title: All Teams
syntax_6232.description: Returns a list containing the teams. (Loop-able)

en: Returns a list containing the teams. (Loop-able)

syntax_6255.creator: hapily
syntax_6255.title: Tool/Held Item of NPC
syntax_6255.description: Sets/gets the npc's held item (main hand).

en: Sets/gets the npc's held item (main hand).

syntax_6250.creator: hapily
syntax_6250.title: Size of Team
syntax_6250.description: Returns the integer value of the size of the specified team.

en: Returns the integer value of the size of the specified team.

syntax_6245.creator: hapily
syntax_6245.title: Offhand of NPC
syntax_6245.description: Sets/gets the item in the npc's offhand.

en: Sets/gets the item in the npc's offhand.

syntax_6247.creator: hapily
syntax_6247.title: Prefix of Team
syntax_6247.description: Sets/gets the prefix of the specified team.

en: Sets/gets the prefix of the specified team.

syntax_6243.creator: hapily
syntax_6243.title: NPC Id of Entity
syntax_6243.description: Returns the id of the specified entity if they are an npc.

en: Returns the id of the specified entity if they are an npc.

syntax_6242.creator: hapily
syntax_6242.title: Last Spawned NPC
syntax_6242.description: Returns the id of the last spawned npc (that was spawned via this addon)

en: Returns the id of the last spawned npc (that was spawned via this addon)

syntax_6244.creator: hapily
syntax_6244.title: Name of NPC
syntax_6244.description: Sets/gets the name of the specified npc.

en: Sets/gets the name of the specified npc.

syntax_6241.creator: hapily
syntax_6241.title: Hurt Sound of NPC
syntax_6241.description:
Sets/gets the hurt sound of the specified NPC
NOTE: Can only be used if the NPC's type is not a player. Additionally, this value will return <none> if it has not been set.

en:
Sets/gets the hurt sound of the specified NPC
NOTE: Can only be used if the NPC's type is not a player. Additionally, this value will return <none> if it has not been set.

syntax_6240.creator: hapily
syntax_6240.title: Glowing of NPC
syntax_6240.description: Sets/gets the glowing state of the specified npc.

en: Sets/gets the glowing state of the specified npc.

syntax_6237.creator: hapily
syntax_6237.title: Display Name of Team
syntax_6237.description:
Sets/gets the display-name of the specified team shown in /team list.
NOTE: The original name of the team will still need to be used when modifying the team in any way.

en:
Sets/gets the display-name of the specified team shown in /team list.
NOTE: The original name of the team will still need to be used when modifying the team in any way.

syntax_6235.creator: hapily
syntax_6235.title: Color of Team
syntax_6235.description:
Sets/gets the color of the specified team.
With 2.0, colors are no longer strings.
1.0 COLORS: red, dark_red, blue, dark_blue, aqua, dark_aqua, dark_purple, light_purple, black, white, yellow, gold, gray, dark_gray, green and dark_green

en:
Sets/gets the color of the specified team.
With 2.0, colors are no longer strings.
1.0 COLORS: red, dark_red, blue, dark_blue, aqua, dark_aqua, dark_purple, light_purple, black, white, yellow, gold, gray, dark_gray, green and dark_green

syntax_6234.creator: hapily
syntax_6234.title: Collidability of NPC
syntax_6234.description: Sets/gets the collidability of the specified npc.

en: Sets/gets the collidability of the specified npc.

syntax_6230.creator: hapily
syntax_6230.title: Unpause NPC Pathfinding
syntax_6230.description: Unpauses the NPC and allows them to complete any previously assigned pathfinding tasks.

en: Unpauses the NPC and allows them to complete any previously assigned pathfinding tasks.

syntax_6233.creator: hapily
syntax_6233.title: Ambient Sound of NPC
syntax_6233.description:
Sets/gets the ambient sound of the specified NPC
NOTE: Can only be used if the NPC's type is not a player. Additionally, this value will return <none> if it has not been set.

en:
Sets/gets the ambient sound of the specified NPC
NOTE: Can only be used if the NPC's type is not a player. Additionally, this value will return <none> if it has not been set.

syntax_6236.creator: hapily
syntax_6236.title: Death Sound of NPC
syntax_6236.description:
Sets/gets the death sound of the specified NPC
NOTE: Can only be used if the NPC's type is not a player. Additionally, this value will return <none> if it has not been set.

en:
Sets/gets the death sound of the specified NPC
NOTE: Can only be used if the NPC's type is not a player. Additionally, this value will return <none> if it has not been set.

syntax_6254.creator: hapily
syntax_6254.title: Team of Entity
syntax_6254.description: Gets the team of the specified entity.

en: Gets the team of the specified entity.

syntax_6239.creator: hapily
syntax_6239.title: Glow Color of NPC
syntax_6239.description:
Sets/gets the glow color of the specified NPC.
With 2.0, colors are no longer strings.
1.0 COLORS: red, dark_red, blue, dark_blue, aqua, dark_aqua, dark_purple, light_purple, black, white, yellow, gold, gray, dark_gray, green and dark_green

en:
Sets/gets the glow color of the specified NPC.
With 2.0, colors are no longer strings.
1.0 COLORS: red, dark_red, blue, dark_blue, aqua, dark_aqua, dark_purple, light_purple, black, white, yellow, gold, gray, dark_gray, green and dark_green

syntax_6249.creator: hapily
syntax_6249.title: Silent State of NPC
syntax_6249.description: Sets/gets the silent state of the specified NPC.

en: Sets/gets the silent state of the specified NPC.

syntax_6251.creator: hapily
syntax_6251.title: Sneak State of Player
syntax_6251.description: Sets/gets the sneak state of the specified player(s)

en: Sets/gets the sneak state of the specified player(s)

syntax_6252.creator: hapily
syntax_6252.title: Sprint State of Player
syntax_6252.description: Sets/gets the sprint state of the specified player(s)

en: Sets/gets the sprint state of the specified player(s)

syntax_6253.creator: hapily
syntax_6253.title: Suffix of Team
syntax_6253.description: Sets/gets the prefix of the specified team.

en: Sets/gets the prefix of the specified team.

syntax_6256.creator: hapily
syntax_6256.title: Vulnerability of NPC
syntax_6256.description: Sets/gets the vulnerability state (whether they can be damaged or not) of the specified NPC.

en: Sets/gets the vulnerability state (whether they can be damaged or not) of the specified NPC.

syntax_6238.creator: hapily
syntax_6238.title: Entries of Team
syntax_6238.description:
Returns a list containing the entries in the specified team. (Loop-able)
Note: If the server restarts or the entity is despawned for some reason, a non-player entity will most likely not be returned.

en:
Returns a list containing the entries in the specified team. (Loop-able)
Note: If the server restarts or the entity is despawned for some reason, a non-player entity will most likely not be returned.
